title: Jan (disambiguation)
content:
'''Jan''' can refer to
[[File:JanDodonna-NEGTC.png|thumb|right|200px|General Jan Dodonna]]
==Canon==
*'''[[Jan]]''', a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic|Rebel]] soldier
*'''[[Jan Dez]]''', a [[Twi'lek]] criminal
*'''[[Jan Dodonna]]''', a Rebel Alliance [[general]]

==Legends==
*'''[[Jan (Rebel)|Jan]]''', a New Republic agent
*'''[[Jan (stormtrooper)|Jan]]''', an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]]
*'''[[Jan Dez/Legends|Jan Dez]]''', a criminal
*'''[[Jan Dovu]]''', the leader of [[Kabal/Legends|Kabal]]
*'''[[Jan Dodonna/Legends|Jan Dodonna]]''', a general of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]
*'''[[Jan Ors]]''', a New Republic Intelligence agent
*The '''[[Justice Action Network]]'''

==Out of universe==
*'''[[Jan Duursema]]''', a comic artist
*'''[[Jan Strnad]]''', a comic author
*The month of '''[[January]]'''
